scene_data.help_file_type:
Default: Standard Data
Standard Data: Recommended; structured, simple, and efficient
Python script: Use when standard data cannot support the scenario
Shell script: Use when standard data cannot support the scenario
Bat script: For Windows systems; use a .bat file
JMeter script: For performance testing; use a .jmx file. The JmeterRunConfig system parameter can control execution parameters (pending integration)
Other scripts: Obtain the execution engine from system parameters based on the file extension, or define the engine in the script
Script engine priority: scriptRunEngine system parameter > first-line definition in the script
Execution engines can be extended using the file extension as the key; configure the environment as needed

Parallel: Run concurrently

assert_template.help_value:
JSON format, e.g.: {"default": "value1", "ch": "value2", "en": "value3"}
Plain format, e.g.: value
The value for the corresponding language is retrieved based on the request header. If no language is defined, the priority is: default > ch > en > other, i.e., Default > Chinese > English > Other languages.
Assertion values for different languages can be defined as needed.
For plain format definitions, the entire value is directly treated as the default.

CICD auto-replace: http://{host:port}/api/v2/api-docs?group=groupName
Empty = use config.json swagger_path

sys_parameter.help_value_list:
JSON format, e.g.: {"default": "v1,v2,v3,v4,...", "ch": "v1,v2,v3,v4,...", "en": "v1,v2,v3,v4,..."}
Plain format, e.g.: v1,v2,v3,v4,...
The value for the matching language is selected based on the request header. If no language-specific value is defined, the priority is: default > ch > en > other, i.e. Default > Chinese > English > Other languages.
System parameter values can be defined for different languages as needed.
For a plain-format definition, the entire value is used as the default.

data_content.sample:
name: "Data Description"
version: 1
api_id: "method_/path"
is_run_pre_apis: "no"
is_run_post_apis: "no"
is_parallel: "no"
is_use_env_config: "yes"
env:
  protocol: "http"
  host: ""
  prepath: "/prePath"
api:
  description: "Description"
  module: ""
  app: "appName"
  method: "get"
  path: "/path"
  pre_apis: []
  param_apis: []
  post_apis: []
single:
  header: {}
  query: {}
  path: {}
  body: {}
multi:
  query: {}
  path: {}
  body: {}
action: []
assert: []
output: {}
test_result: []
urls: []
request: []
response: []
